title: Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum
tagline: Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: CSI-Holy Trinity Church is a church under the auspices of the Protestant Church of South India, a uniting Church.
overview.description: CSI-Holy Trinity Church is a church under the auspices of the Protestant Church of South India, a uniting Church. It is located in the Bolarum locality of Secunderabad Cantonment.

topPlaces.name: Macha Bollaram
topPlaces.description: Macha Bolarum or Machabollarum or Macha Bollaram is a major locality in Alwal circle of Secunderabad zone of Hyderabad, India. It comes under Alwal Mandal of Medchal-Malkajgiri district.

topPlaces.name: Bolarum
topPlaces.description: Bolarum( Telugu :బొల్లారం ) is a locality in Secunderabad in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is in the Hyderabad Metropolitan Region.

topPlaces.name: Rashtrapati Nilayam
topPlaces.description: Rashtrapati Nilayam (lit. 'The president's house'), formerly known as Residency House, is the official winter retreat of the president of India located in Hyderabad, Telangana. The president stays here for at least two weeks during their winter visit and conducts official business.

topPlaces.name: Alwal Lake
topPlaces.description: Alwal Lake is an artificial lake near Hyderabad, India, about 8 kilometers north of Secunderabad. It is situated in Alwal.

topPlaces.name: Kowkur
topPlaces.description: Kowkur is a Town in Malkajgiri mandal, Medchal district in Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Alwal
topPlaces.description: Alwal is in Hyderabad city, and a suburb of Hyderabad. Earlier, Alwal was a part of Malkajgiri Mandal but in 2006, Alwal Municipality was merged into Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Ammuguda
topPlaces.description: Ammuguda is a revenue village in Malkajgiri Mandal and also a part of 8th ward, Secunderabad Cantonment Board, Urban sprawling of [[[Secunderabad]] City in the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Malkajgiri Mandal in Medchal district of the state.

topPlaces.name: National Industrial Security Academy
topPlaces.description: The National Industrial Security Academy (commonly abbreviated as NISA) is the premier training institution of Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) for training in industrial security and disaster management. The Academy is spread over 245-acre (99 ha) of land and is located in Hakimpet on the Rajiv Gandhi State Highway, Medchal–Malkajgiri District, of Hyderabad, Telangana.

items.note: Macha Bolarum or Machabollarum or Macha Bollaram is a major locality in Alwal circle of Secunderabad zone of Hyderabad, India. It comes under Alwal Mandal of Medchal-Malkajgiri district.
Bolarum( Telugu :బొల్లారం ) is a locality in Secunderabad in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is in the Hyderabad Metropolitan Region.

Rashtrapati Nilayam (lit. 'The president's house'), formerly known as Residency House, is the official winter retreat of the president of India located in Hyderabad, Telangana. The president stays here for at least two weeks during their winter visit and conducts official business.
Alwal Lake is an artificial lake near Hyderabad, India, about 8 kilometers north of Secunderabad. It is situated in Alwal.
Kowkur is a Town in Malkajgiri mandal, Medchal district in Telangana, India.
Alwal is in Hyderabad city, and a suburb of Hyderabad. Earlier, Alwal was a part of Malkajgiri Mandal but in 2006, Alwal Municipality was merged into Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation.

Ammuguda is a revenue village in Malkajgiri Mandal and also a part of 8th ward, Secunderabad Cantonment Board, Urban sprawling of [[[Secunderabad]] City in the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Malkajgiri Mandal in Medchal district of the state.

The National Industrial Security Academy (commonly abbreviated as NISA) is the premier training institution of Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) for training in industrial security and disaster management. The Academy is spread over 245-acre (99 ha) of land and is located in Hakimpet on the Rajiv Gandhi State Highway, Medchal–Malkajgiri District, of Hyderabad, Telangana.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum?
faq.a: The best time to visit Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (32 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (9 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum?
faq.a: Stays in Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Holy Trinity Church, Bolarum?
faq.a: The top attractions are Macha Bollaram, Bolarum, Rashtrapati Nilayam, Alwal Lake, Kowkur.
